description_long: This lamp features a tall, slender, triangular prism-shaped frame constructed from thin metal rods, giving it a minimalist and geometric appearance. At the top of the frame sits a single, spherical, frosted glass bulb that emits a soft, diffused light. The lamp's base is open, with the three metal legs converging at the ground, providing stability while maintaining an airy, open structure. A visible power cord descends from the bulb socket and trails out from the base, emphasizing its functional, utilitarian design. The overall aesthetic is modern and industrial, with clean lines and a focus on simplicity. The lamp is likely intended for use as a floor lamp in contemporary urban environments.
description: A tall, minimalist floor lamp with a triangular metal frame and a spherical frosted glass bulb at the top. The design is modern and geometric, with an exposed power cord.
description_view_0: Front view showing the triangular frame converging at the base and the spherical bulb centered at the top.
description_view_1: Angled side view revealing the depth of the triangular frame and the trailing power cord.
description_view_2: Rear view with the frame's symmetry and the bulb directly above the central axis.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, again highlighting the open frame and the cord extending from the base.
